docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA ORTIZ, YORLENY ISAMARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. DECLARATION AND SC-109. SERVED FEB-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA ORTIZ, YORLENY ISAMARY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. (VERONICA ROSALES) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YORLENY ISAMARY GARCIA ORTIZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
